purpose: DO-330-INSPIRED self-qualification corpus for KEEL ITSELF (not a TQL credential; docs/10 §10.3). Each case plants a condition and declares the verdict Keel MUST return; src/qualify.mjs runs Keel against each in a hermetic temp dir and asserts. A core guarantee with no fixture is an unproven claim.

case_contract.front_end: profile | registry — which Keel runner ingests the entry
case_contract.entry: the profile.json / registry.json filename inside this fixture dir
case_contract.expect_verdict: GO | NO-GO | BLOCKED — the mark Keel must print
case_contract.description: the planted condition and the guarantee it proves
